description_long: This is a male adult dressed in a sports uniform, specifically a cricket jersey and pants, with 'INDIA' written on the front and the number '10' on the back. The outfit features short sleeves with orange trim and matching athletic pants, both designed for comfort and mobility. The figure is wearing athletic sneakers with visible laces and a low-cut design. His arms are extended horizontally, and his hands are open, fingers splayed. The hairstyle is short and neatly groomed, with no visible facial hair or accessories. The overall build is athletic, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting an active, sporty persona.
description: An athletic adult male in a cricket uniform with 'INDIA' on the front, number '10' on the back, and wearing sneakers. He stands with arms outstretched and a short, neat hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'INDIA' text on the jersey, athletic build, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the fit of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the number '10' on the back of the jersey and the back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the uniform and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear, short-sleeve sports jersey and athletic pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
